Who We Are

What is AgroLens AI?

AgroLens AI is a student-led agritech company built under the Junior Achievement Nigeria Company Programme by students of Sunflower Schools.

We developed a free, AI-powered multilingual agricultural platform that combines crop disease detection, market prices, buyer connections and agricultural financing into one intelligent app — simple enough for every farmer, powerful enough for cooperatives and agribusinesses.

Our platform speaks to farmers in English, Hausa, Yoruba, Igbo and Nigerian Pidgin — because no farmer should be left behind because of language.

Our Vision

To become Africa's most trusted AI-powered agricultural platform, empowering every farmer with the knowledge, technology and market access needed to achieve sustainable prosperity.

Our Mission

To simplify farming through Artificial Intelligence by providing accessible digital solutions that improve productivity, increase farmers' incomes and promote sustainable agricultural practices.

What We Offer

Everything a Farmer Needs

One intelligent platform. Multiple agricultural solutions. Free for every farmer.

🔍

Crop Disease Detection

Point your camera at any crop and get an instant AI diagnosis — diseases, pests and nutrient deficiencies detected in seconds.

💊

Treatment Recommendations

Get practical treatment options you can apply immediately, using what you already have on your farm.

📈

Daily Market Prices

Know the real value of your harvest before you sell. Access live market prices updated daily across Nigerian markets.

🤝

Verified Buyer Connections

Connect directly with verified buyers inside and outside Nigeria — no middlemen, better prices.

💰

Agricultural Loans

Access financing opportunities to grow your farm business through our financial institution partnerships.

🗣️

5 Languages

Available in English, Hausa, Yoruba, Igbo and Nigerian Pidgin — with AI voice interaction for low-literacy farmers.

Our Results

Our Impact So Far

₦2.8M

Combined farmer revenue increase through improved crop management and better market access

0

Farmers joined our platform and are making smarter decisions every farming season

0

Farmers and students trained through our AgroLens Smart Farmer Empowerment Initiative

🌱 AgroLens AI invested ₦84,000 — 20% of net profit — into our Smart Farmer Empowerment Initiative, providing free AI diagnosis, improved seeds and farm input packs to 45 vulnerable farmers across our communities.
